sqlMap.select:
SELECT result.inst_nm , result.evl_type_cd , result.inst_type_cd , result.group_no , result.inst_cd , result.inst_mng_cd , result.up_inst_mng_cd , result.up_inst_cd , IF(result.self_verification_count = 0, 0, result.target_indicator_count) AS self_verification_count , IF(result.system_count = 0, result.verification_count + result.system_indicator_count, result.verification_count) AS verification_count , 0 AS self_verification_system_count , 0 AS verification_system_count , result.etc_info FROM ( /* 기관별 카운팅 */ SELECT target_inst.inst_nm , target_inst.evl_type_cd , target_inst.inst_type_cd , target_inst.group_no , target_inst.inst_cd , target_inst.inst_mng_cd , target_inst.up_inst_mng_cd , target_inst.up_inst_cd , ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM pleevlidtlm AS indi_detail WHERE evli_no = #quantitativeIndicatorNo# AND evli_type_cd = '1' ) AS target_indicator_count , ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM pleevlidtlm AS indi_detail WHERE evli_no = #quantitativeIndicatorNo# AND evli_type_cd = '1' AND rgr_qy_type_cd = '2' ) AS system_indicator_count , ( SELECT COUNT(inst_system.sys_no) FROM pleprvcprcssyst AS inst_system WHERE target_inst.group_no = inst_system.group_no AND target_inst.inst_mng_cd = inst_system.inst_mng_cd AND target_inst.inst_cd = inst_system.inst_cd ) AS system_count , SUM(summery.visit_site_count) AS etc_info , COUNT(DISTINCT summery.evli_dtl_no) AS self_verification_count , COUNT( CASE WHEN (summery.not_fulfill_count + summery.complete_count) - summery.target_count >= 0 THEN 1 END ) + IF(target_inst.evl_type_cd != '01', 1, 0) AS verification_count FROM pleprvclvlevlm AS evaluation INNER JOIN pletrgtinstgroupt AS inst_group ON evaluation.trgt_inst_group_no = inst_group.group_no AND evaluation.evl_no = #evaluationNo# INNER JOIN pletrgtinstt AS target_inst ON target_inst.group_no = inst_group.group_no
AND target_inst.evl_type_cd = #evaluationTypeBinder#
AND target_inst.inst_type_cd = #companyEvaluationTypeBinder#
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT summery_raw.group_no , summery_raw.inst_mng_cd , summery_raw.inst_cd , summery_raw.evli_dtl_no , COUNT( CASE WHEN summery_raw.site_insp_req_cd = 'y' THEN 1 END ) AS visit_site_count , COUNT(DISTINCT summery_raw.sys_no) AS target_count , COUNT( CASE WHEN summery_raw.itsl_evl_rslt_cd = '02' THEN 1 END ) AS not_fulfill_count , COUNT( CASE WHEN summery_raw.evl_rslt_cd THEN 1 END ) AS complete_count FROM ( SELECT self_sys.group_no , self_sys.inst_mng_cd , self_sys.inst_cd , self_sys.sys_no , self_sys.evli_no , self_sys.evli_dtl_no , self_sys.itsl_evl_rslt_cd , ver_sys.evli_dtl_no AS ver_evli_dtl_no , ver_sys.evl_rslt_cd , ver_sys.site_insp_req_cd FROM plesysitslevlt AS self_sys LEFT JOIN plesysevlrslttt AS ver_sys ON ver_sys.group_no = self_sys.group_no AND ver_sys.inst_cd = self_sys.inst_cd AND ver_sys.inst_mng_cd = self_sys.inst_mng_cd AND ver_sys.sys_no = self_sys.sys_no AND ver_sys.evli_no = self_sys.evli_no AND ver_sys.evli_dtl_no = self_sys.evli_dtl_no AND ver_sys.evl_prgrs_stts_cd IN ('04', '05') WHERE self_sys.evli_no = #quantitativeIndicatorNo#
UNION
SELECT self_inst.group_no , self_inst.inst_mng_cd , self_inst.inst_cd , 0 AS sys_no , self_inst.evli_no , self_inst.evli_dtl_no , self_inst.itsl_evl_rslt_cd , ver.evli_dtl_no AS ver_evli_dtl_no , ver.evl_rslt_cd , ver.site_insp_req_cd FROM pleinstitslevlt AS self_inst LEFT JOIN pleinstevlrslttt AS ver ON ver.group_no = self_inst.group_no AND ver.inst_cd = self_inst.inst_cd AND ver.inst_mng_cd = self_inst.inst_mng_cd AND ver.evli_no = self_inst.evli_no AND ver.evli_dtl_no = self_inst.evli_dtl_no AND ver.evl_prgrs_stts_cd IN ('04', '05') WHERE self_inst.evli_no = #quantitativeIndicatorNo# ) AS summery_raw GROUP BY summery_raw.group_no , summery_raw.inst_mng_cd , summery_raw.inst_cd , summery_raw.evli_dtl_no ) AS summery ON target_inst.group_no = summery.group_no AND target_inst.inst_mng_cd = summery.inst_mng_cd AND target_inst.inst_cd = summery.inst_cd WHERE 1=1
AND UPPER(target_inst.inst_nm) LIKE '%'||UPPER(#companyName#)||'%'
GROUP BY target_inst.inst_nm , target_inst.evl_type_cd , target_inst.inst_type_cd , target_inst.group_no , target_inst.inst_cd , target_inst.inst_mng_cd , target_inst.up_inst_mng_cd , target_inst.up_inst_cd ) AS result WHERE 1=1
AND result.target_indicator_count = IF(result.system_count = 0, result.system_indicator_count, 0) + result.verification_count
AND result.target_indicator_count != IF(result.system_count = 0, result.system_indicator_count, 0) + result.verification_count
AND result.etc_info != 0
AND (result.etc_info = 0 OR result.etc_info IS NULL)
ORDER BY CASE result.inst_type_cd WHEN '01' THEN 1 WHEN '05' THEN 2 WHEN '06' THEN 3 WHEN '02' THEN 4 WHEN '03' THEN 5 WHEN '07' THEN 6 WHEN '08' THEN 7 WHEN '09' THEN 8 WHEN '11' THEN 9 WHEN '12' THEN 10 WHEN '04' THEN 11 WHEN '10' THEN 12 ELSE 13 END , result.inst_nm
LIMIT #firstIndex#, #recordCountPerPage#

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT t1.inst_mng_cd , t1.inst_cd , t1.group_no , t1.inst_nm , t1.evl_type_cd , t1.inst_type_cd , t1.up_inst_mng_cd , t1.up_inst_cd , t1.sbmsn_stts_cd , NVL(t2.inst_evl_cmpl_cnt, 0) + NVL(sys_evl_cmpl_cnt, 0) + IF(t1.evl_type_cd != '01', 1, 0) AS VERIFICATION_COUNT , NVL( ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT evli_dtl_no) FROM plesysitslevlt WHERE group_no = t1.group_no AND inst_mng_cd = t1.inst_mng_cd GROUP BY inst_mng_cd ) , 0) + NVL( ( SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT evli_dtl_no) FROM pleinstitslevlt WHERE group_no = t1.group_no AND inst_mng_cd = t1.inst_mng_cd GROUP BY inst_mng_cd ), 0 ) + IF(t1.evl_type_cd != '01', 1, 0) AS SELF_VERIFICATION_COUNT , ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM pleinstevlrsltt WHERE inst_mng_cd = t1.inst_mng_cd AND group_no = t1.group_no AND site_insp_req_cd = 'Y' ) + ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM plesysevlrsltt WHERE inst_mng_cd = t1.inst_mng_cd AND group_no = t1.group_no AND site_insp_req_cd = 'Y' ) AS ETC_INFO FROM pletrgtinstt t1 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT b.inst_mng_cd , SUM( CASE WHEN b.itsl_evl_rslt_cd IN('02', '03') THEN 1 ELSE CASE WHEN c.evl_prgrs_stts_cd = '04' THEN 1 END END ) AS inst_evl_cmpl_cnt FROM pleevlidtlm a LEFT JOIN pleinstitslevlt b ON b.evli_no = a.evli_no AND b.evli_dtl_no = a.evli_dtl_no AND b.group_no = #companyGroupNo# LEFT JOIN pleinstevlrsltt c ON c.evli_no = b.evli_no AND c.evli_dtl_no = b.evli_dtl_no AND c.inst_mng_cd = b.inst_mng_cd AND c.evl_prgrs_stts_cd = '04' WHERE a.evli_no = #quantitativeIndicatorNo# GROUP BY b.inst_mng_cd ) t2 ON t1.inst_mng_cd = t2.inst_mng_cd LEFT JOIN ( SELECT e.inst_mng_cd , CAST ( SUM( CASE WHEN e.tot_cnt = e.cmpl_cnt THEN '1' END ) AS NUMERIC ) AS sys_evl_cmpl_cnt FROM ( SELECT a.inst_mng_cd , a.evli_no , a.evli_dtl_no , ( SELECT COUNT(sys_no) FROM pleprvcprcssyst WHERE inst_mng_cd = a.inst_mng_cd AND group_no = a.group_no AND evl_trgt_yn = 'Y' AND sys_evl_prgrs_stts_cd = '01' ) AS tot_cnt , SUM ( CASE WHEN a.itsl_evl_rslt_cd IN('02', '03') THEN 1 ELSE CASE WHEN b.evl_prgrs_stts_cd = '04' THEN 1 END END ) AS cmpl_cnt FROM plesysitslevlt a LEFT JOIN plesysevlrsltt b ON a.group_no = b.group_no AND b.evl_prgrs_stts_cd = '04' AND a.inst_mng_cd = b.inst_mng_cd AND a.evli_no = b.evli_no AND a.evli_dtl_no = b.evli_dtl_no AND a.sys_no = b.sys_no WHERE a.evli_no = #quantitativeIndicatorNo# AND a.group_no = #companyGroupNo# GROUP BY a.inst_mng_cd, a.evli_no, a.evli_dtl_no ) e GROUP BY e.inst_mng_cd ) t3 ON t3.inst_mng_cd = t1.inst_mng_cd WHERE t1.group_no = #companyGroupNo# ) WHERE 1=1
AND evl_type_cd = #evaluationTypeBinder#
AND inst_type_cd = #companyEvaluationTypeBinder#
AND UPPER(inst_nm) LIKE '%'||UPPER(#companyName#)||'%'
AND verification_count = self_verification_count
AND verification_count < self_verification_count
AND etc_info != 0
AND (etc_info = 0 OR etc_info IS NULL)
ORDER BY FIELD(inst_type_cd, '01', '05', '06', '02', '03', '07', '08', '09', '11', '12', '04', '10') , inst_nm LIMIT #firstIndex#, #recordCountPerPage#
